sourceRef.citation: Wikipedia: List of unsolved problems (number theory)

statement.en: Brocard's problem (Erdős Problem 398): Does n! + 1 = m² have integer solutions other than (n,m) ∈ {(4,5), (5,11), (7,71)}?
statement.ja: Brocard の問題 (Erdős 問題 398): n! + 1 = m² は (n,m) = (4,5), (5,11), (7,71) 以外に整数解を持つか？

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: ∃ n > 7 Diophantine existence; 計算的には N ≤ 10^15 で 4th 解なし (Berndt-Galway 2000 系列)
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE (追加解の有無), D-FUMT₈=NEITHER; 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=2 in ErdosProblems/398.lean)

external: Berndt-Galway 2000: exhaustive search up to N = 10⁹, no 4th solution (later extended to ≥ 10¹⁵)
Ramanujan 1913 noted the same three pairs independently

formalization.notes: Upstream formal-conjectures/ErdosProblems/398.lean は 2 sorry の terse scaffold. Rei-AIOS は独立に CollatzRei/BrocardProblem.lean (n ≤ 12, brute force) + CollatzRei/Step980BrocardExtended.lean (n = 13..20, Nat.sqrt approach) で拡張実証 (26 理論, 0 sorry)

known_progress.event: Ramanujan independently noted the same three pairs
Berndt-Galway: N ≤ 10⁹ exhaustive search, no 4th solution (later ≥ 10¹⁵)
Rei-AIOS STEP 980 (commit cc1fab3): Lean 4 verification extended to n ∈ [1, 20] via Nat.sqrt-based approach (O(log) vs brute force O(√(n!)))
known_progress.impact: n ≤ 12 (BrocardProblem.lean brute force) + n = 13..20 (Step980BrocardExtended.lean via sqrt_not_square_impl bridge lemma). 18 theorems, 0 sorry, build verified.

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: n ≤ 100 までは Nat.factorial + Nat.sqrt で decidable → 具体検証は tractable. 一般 n の open は 150 年.
reiAssessment.solveRationale: I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE, NEITHER, scaffold (2 sorry). 数値検証は可能だが一般解決は古典的に困難
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: 基本 scaffold のみ、数値 case は tractable
reiAssessment.famousHardCap: Diophantine 古典 open, 一般解決は世界的 open

corrected: 2026-04-23 (STEP 979 shim sweep — metadata resync to actual ErdosProblems/398.lean)
